name: Consentmanager
description: Consentmanager — Multi-law consent management platform for GDPR, ePrivacy, and CCPA with A/B testing and analytics.

seo.title: Consentmanager — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Consentmanager: Consentmanager — Multi-law consent management platform for GDPR, ePrivacy, and CCPA with A/B testing and analytics.

when_to_use: A/B testing consent banner variants for opt-in rate optimization
Consent analytics dashboard for privacy compliance reporting
IAB TCF 2.0 compliant consent layer for ad-supported apps
Consent proof API for legal documentation requirements

pros: Full IAB TCF 2.2 support for ad-tech publishers
A/B testing on consent UI boosts opt-in rates
Analytics on consent behavior inform design choices
cons: Dashboard UX feels dated compared to newer CMPs
Pricing unclear without a sales conversation
review.verdict: A serious publisher-grade CMP with TCF depth, but not the tool for a simple marketing site.
review.best_for: Digital publishers and ad-tech dependent sites needing TCF 2.2
review.not_for: Small marketing sites that just need a basic cookie banner
